build.buildCommand: PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true PUPPETEER_SKIP_CHROMIUM_DOWNLOAD=true pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/aurelion run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build

deploy.preDeployCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push && (cd artifacts/api-server && node --import=tsx src/scripts/seed-vendors.ts || true) && (cd artifacts/api-server && node --import=tsx src/scripts/seed-real-activities.ts || true)
